{{CargoRelic
|name=Teutonic Knight Emblem
|class_id=22481
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=07-09
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Jul 9, 1190 AD, the Teutonic Knights were founded in Acre of the Kingdom of Jerusalem.<br>During the Third Crusade, a large number of German knights joined the Crusading army, hoping that Frederick I would lead them to victory. However, Frederick I accidentally drowned in a small river. In Acre, the German knights were leaderless, suffering from heat and disease, so they asked the Pope for approval to become a military order. Finally, the Pope issued a charter, and the Teutonic Knights were established, with Acre becoming the first headquarters of the order.
|fame=32
|art=28
|fth=27
|civ=46
|tech=21
|ss1=Dragon Minion RUSH +1%
|ss2=Dragon Minion RUSH +2%
|ss3=Dragon Minion RUSH +3%
|ss4=Dragon Minion RUSH +5%
|ss7=Dragon Minion RUSH +5%<br>Dragon Minion RUSH +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Wishingegg skill I.png|50px]]Place in Wishing Egg: Wishing Egg hatching efficiency +5%
}}
